case_title: JEAN CLIFTON VS. KENNETH TANG et al

docket_entries.description: REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-24-2011 - DISMISSAL ON FILE.

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON MAR-22-2011 IN 206, PLAINTIFF JEAN CLIFTON'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP 36 (A). THE TRIAL DATE IS SET FOR 7/11/11 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF 6/3/11 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 610 IS VACATED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: E. BURA; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
